zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Biset於1185年出生在英國奧可福爾時，他的父親Henry Biset30歲，母親Iseult Pantulf15歲。他與Alice Basset結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1241年8月24日之前在英國英格蘭戴文特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Biset于1185年出生在英国奧可福爾时，他的父亲Henry Biset30岁，母亲Iseult Pantulf15岁。他与Alice Basset结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1241年8月24日之前在英国英格兰戴文特福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Biset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Binette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Cecile, Normand, Raoul, Alain, Alphe, Donat, Fernand, Francois, Gedeon, Gilles.
Altered form of French Binet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: René Binet from Saint-Jean-de-Sauves in Vienne, France, married Catherine Bourgeois in Quebec City, QC, in 1667.

variants.name: Robinet
meanings: French: from a pet form of the personal name   Robin  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Biset was born in 1185, in Oxfordshire, England, his father, Henry Biset, was 30 and his mother, Iseult Pantulf, was 15. He married Alice Basset. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died before 24 August 1241, in Whitford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Biset est né en 1185, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Biset, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Iseult Pantulf, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Alice Basset. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 24 août 1241, à Whitford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Biset 1185 in Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Biset 30 und seine Mutter Iseult Pantulf 15. Er hat Alice Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 24. August 1241 in Whitford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Biset è nato il nel 1185 nel Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Biset, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Iseult Pantulf, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Alice Basset. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì prima del 24 agosto 1241, nel Whitford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Bisetが1185年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Bisetは30歳，母Iseult Pantulfは15歳であった。Alice Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1241年8月24日以前にイギリスイギリスデボンウィトフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Biset(이)가 1185년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Biset(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Iseult Pantulf(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Alice Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 8월 24일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 휘트퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Biset nasceu em 1185, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Biset, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Iseult Pantulf, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Basset. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 24 de agosto de 1241, em Whitford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Biset родился в 1185 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Biset было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Iseult Pantulf, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Basset. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер перед 24 августа 1241 г. в местности уитфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Biset nació en 1185, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Biset, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Iseult Pantulf, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Alice Basset. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió antes de 24 de agosto de 1241, en Whitford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
